penalties.description: The marked circle was not completely cut out by the end of the video. Final state shows incomplete cutting.

consensus_score.reasoning: Both models agreed on timing (215 seconds) but disagreed on task completion. Claude identified incomplete circle cutting which is an automatic zero condition per the rubric, while GPT assessed only line deviation penalties. Given that both models noted uncertainty about final circle release and Claude's reasoning aligns with the incomplete_circle penalty category, the incomplete task assessment takes precedence.

claude_value.description: The marked circle was not completely cut out by the end of the video. Final state shows incomplete cutting.

gpt_value.description: The cut deviated outside the marked circle in several locations.

disagreements.rationale: Incomplete circle cutting is a more severe condition than line deviation. Both models expressed uncertainty about final completion, and incomplete_circle penalty category exists specifically for this scenario.
Incomplete circle penalty results in automatic zero score per rubric, overriding any partial credit from line deviation penalties.
